zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Saye於大約1259年出生在英國英格蘭肯特時，她的父親Sir William de Say III51歲，母親Sibyl Marshal48歲。她於1274年與John Marshal在英國諾福爾可辛加姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1318年在英國諾福爾可辛加姆享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Saye于大约1259年出生在英国英格兰肯特时，她的父亲Sir William de Say III51岁，母亲Sibyl Marshal48岁。她于1274年与John Marshal在英国諾福爾可辛加姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1318年在英国諾福爾可辛加姆享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Saje: nickname for someone with very dark, sooty hair, derived from the root of sajast ‘sooty’, or directly from saja ‘soot’.
West African (Liberia): from the personal name Saye, found among the Mano (Mah) people, denoting a first-born boy.

variants.name: Say
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Sai in Orne or Say in Indre, France, perhaps so called from a Gaulish personal name Saius + the Latin locative suffix -acum (see also French name 3 below).

English: nickname, perhaps for someone who made or sold say, a type of woollen cloth, or for an habitual wearer of clothes made of this material, from Middle English sai(e) ‘say’ (Old French saie, from Latin saga, plural of sagum ‘military cloak’). See also Sayer .

French (southern): topographic name from saix (from Latin saxum) ‘rock’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example, Say in Loire, Saix in Tarn and Vienne, Le Saix in Hautes-Alpes, or Les Saix in Isère.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Saye was born about 1259, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William de Say III, was 51 and her mother, Sibyl Marshal, was 48. She married John Marshal in 1274, in Hingham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1318, in Hingham, Norfolk, England, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Saye est née environ 1259, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Say III, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Marshal, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé John Marshal en 1274, à Hingham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1318, à Hingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Saye um 1259 in Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Say III 51 und ihre Mutter Sibyl Marshal 48. Sie hat 1274 in Hingham, Norfolk, England John Marshal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1318 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Hingham, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Saye è nata il circa 1259 nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William de Say III, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Sibyl Marshal, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato John Marshal nel 1274, nel Hingham, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1318, nel Hingham, Norfolk, England, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Sayeが約1259年にイギリスイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir William de Say IIIは51歳，母Sibyl Marshalは48歳であった。1274年にイギリスノーフォルクヒンガムでJohn Marshalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1318年にイギリスノーフォルクヒンガムで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Saye(이)가 대략 1259년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Say III(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl Marshal(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 1274년 영국 노르폴크 잉함에서 John Marshal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1318년 영국 노르폴크 잉함에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Saye nasceu aproximadamente 1259, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William de Say III, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Marshal, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com John Marshal em 1274, em Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1318, em Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Saye родилась около 1259 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William de Say III было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Marshal, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Marshal в 1274 г. в местности хингхам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1318 г. в местности хингхам, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise de Saye nació aproximadamente 1259, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William de Say III, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Sibyl Marshal, tenía 48 años. Se casó con John Marshal en 1274, en Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1318, en Hingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años.
